title: fritillaria tubaeformis var. delphinensis
intro: Fritillaria tubaeformis var. delphinensis is a rare, bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the lily family and is native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Fritillaria tubaeformis var. delphinensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant include dried bulbs, which can be decocted in water to create a tea or made into capsules for oral consumption.
